ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (error.errorType.identifier == "COMPOSITE_ROUTING") error.childErrors else error

set-variable.doc:name: Set Variable
set-variable.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var isPostRequest = (error.errorType.identifier[0] == "COMPOSITE_ROUTING")
var errorIdentifier = if (isPostRequest) (payload.errorType.identifier[0] default "") as String else (error.errorType.identifier default "") as String
--- errorIdentifier match { case "BAD_REQUEST" -> "400" case "CONNECTIVITY" -> "502" case "FORBIDDEN" -> "403" case "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED" -> "405" case "NOT_FOUND" -> "404" case "UNAUTHORIZED" -> "401" case "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE" -> "415" case "UNKNOWN" -> "400" case "COMPOSITE_ROUTING" -> "400" case "EXPRESSION" -> "400" else -> "500" }]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json var errorIdentifier = (error.errorType.identifier default "") as String --- errorIdentifier match{ case is "BAD_REQUEST"-> "400" case is "NOT_FOUND" -> "404" case is "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED"-> "405" case is "NOT_ACCEPTABLE"-> "406" case is "UNAUTHORIZED"->"401" case is "UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE"-> "415" case is "TOO_MANY_REQUESTS"-> "429" else -> "500" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json skipNullOn="everywhere" --- { "status": error.errorType.identifier, "code": vars.httpStatus, "shortMessage": error.errorMessage.payload.message default error.description }
